Tool 01 of 07

Missed Calls = Lost Jobs.
Here's Exactly What It's Costing You.

Most owners think they answer 90% of calls. The actual average is 68%. Every unanswered call is a job that went to a competitor. Find out the dollar amount walking out your door every month.

Your Numbers Based on patterns from 200+ home service companies
Monthly inbound calls Total calls - answered + missed
Industry typical range: 150-600 calls/month
Current answer rate % of calls someone actually picks up
%
Industry average: 68% · Top 25%: 89%+
Booking rate (answered calls) % of answered calls that book a job
%
Industry average: 38% · Top 25%: 58%+
Average job value Avg ticket for a booked job
$

Most owners think they answer 90% of calls.

The actual industry average is 68%. At 300 calls a month, that is 96 calls going unanswered, each one a job that went to a competitor.
